Decompiled bn_mul_mont contains architecture-specific dispatch: for limb counts divisible by 4 it checks OPENSSL_armv8_rsa_neonized and calls bn_mul8x_mont_neon(), otherwise dispatches to _bn_sqr8x_mont() for multiples of 8 and _bn_mul4x_mont() for multiples of 4 before falling back to generic Montgomery multiply code.

BN_mod_mul_montgomery is a thin wrapper around sub_137A40, and a later unlabelled function is a highly unrolled limb multiply/Montgomery arithmetic routine using 64x64->128 products and explicit carry propagation.
